_meta.description: Per-terrain-type properties. Dig time is modified by drill class effectiveness and tier. Terrain affects movement speed. Terrain does NOT affect chest spawns. Bedrock bounds the playfield and is not destructible.
_meta.status: DEV PLACEHOLDERS — provisional numbers so digging has feel. NOT final; pending balance pass.

fields.base_dig_time: seconds for a Common drill of a neutral class to break one tile
fields.class_effectiveness: per drill-class multiplier on dig time (lower = the class is strong vs this terrain)
